# Boat4You

> Boat4You is a yacht charter and boat rental marketplace covering 100+ countries — sailing yachts, catamarans, and motorboats — with real-time availability, transparent pricing, secure online booking, and 24/7 support.

Boat4You lets travellers search live availability and prices across thousands of boats from verified charter operators, compare options by destination, dates, boat type, and amenities, and book online. Boats are offered bareboat or crewed. Prices are shown per week with all mandatory fees included.

## Core pages

- [Home & boat search](https://www.boat4you.com/): search and book boats by destination, dates, and type with live prices.
- [How we work](https://www.boat4you.com/how-we-work): the booking, payment, and charter process explained.
- [About us](https://www.boat4you.com/about-us): who Boat4You is.
- [FAQ](https://www.boat4you.com/faq): common questions about chartering and booking.
- [Blog](https://www.boat4you.com/blog): sailing guides, destinations, and tips.
- [Contact & support](https://www.boat4you.com/contact-us): get in touch, 24/7 support.

## Legal

- [Terms & conditions](https://www.boat4you.com/terms-and-conditions)
- [Privacy policy](https://www.boat4you.com/privacy-policy)
